note: Stage-1 ROUND 2 (text, Qwen3-1.7B). Round-1 winner = chunk_size 4096, lr 3e-4, lora_r 32, train_interval 4, epochs 3 (online 0.483, delta 12.4%) — ALL on edges. chunk_size PINNED to the winner 4096 (a real text knob; static keeps dropping with it, and larger chunks also suppress the overfitting seen at chunk 1024). Round 2 extends the four adaptation edges (lr up, r up, epochs up, train_interval down) + adds the MLP axis. WATCH overfitting: aggressive lr/epochs went NEGATIVE at small chunk in round 1, so a run that turns worse marks the interior optimum. max_bytes 8e6 -> 4e6 (text is compute-heavy; ranking is stable at 4MB). If a knob is still on an edge after round 2, extend again in round 3 (and test chunk_size 8192 there).
